name: Trello
description: Monitor Trello board organization and workspace members for compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to https://trello.com/power-ups/admin
2. Create a new Power-Up (or select an existing one)
3. Click on your Power-Up → go to the API Key tab
4. Copy your API Key
5. Click the Token link next to your key → click Allow to authorize
6. Copy the generated token
7. Enter your API Key and Token below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found at https://trello.com/power-ups/admin → your Power-Up → API Key tab

credentialFields.label: Token
credentialFields.helpText: Generate at https://trello.com/power-ups/admin → your Power-Up → API Key tab → click the Token link

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Trello organization members and their access levels

checks.name: Separation of Environments
checks.description: Verifies that Trello boards are organized for environment separation
